title: Publications and Manuals - Canada.ca
content:
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada

## Publications and manuals
Read the official study guide for the Canadian citizenship test

## Welcome to Canada: Multilingual resources on settling in Canada
Download content in various languages about life in Canada, like housing, working, getting health care and more.

### Working Temporarily in Canada
- International Mobility Program – Get to know your rights while working in Canada September 2022
Older publications can be found on the Library and Archives Canada website.
Read or download our publications online. Digital versions are always up to date and available to view or download instantly, ensuring you have the most current content at your fingertips.

### Need a printed copy?
While we encourage digital use, we understand that some situations may call for a physical copy. If needed, you can order printed versions of select publications through our partner, Gilmore Global Logistics Services.
Shipping times may vary Shipping times for publications vary depending on your location and may take up to 10 business days.
Print publications are available by request for
- Citizenship Study Guide ( Download instantly )
- Welcome to Canada – What you should know (book)
- Immigration Fraud – Protect Yourself (brochure)
- New to Canada? We can help you succeed (brochure)
